dsl_rule.translation_notes: Double Bottom pattern detected via Donchian Channel upper band (highest high breakout). Entry requires close above dc_upper for breakout confirmation. Exit uses 20-period SMA as trend reversal proxy since author provided no explicit stop/target. Pattern has 78% success rate in bull markets with ~40% average rise. Throwback condition and sector correlation checks are qualitative and cannot be encoded in rule engine.

source_rule_text: Double Bottom (Adam & Adam): Wait for breakout confirmation (close above the highest high) in a bullish pattern during bull market trend
